components.name: Private Mentor (Intimate Data Boundary)
components.desc: Security boundary for intimate data: journal interpretation, profile building, mentor ledger, private Q&A. Handles R17 obligations. 10 modules (journal-ingestion, journal-interpreter, persona, profile-store, mentor-ledger, embedding-pipeline, private-hub-types, sync-to-supabase, pattern-engine [personal patterns], proactive-scheduler [personal rituals]). Architecturally distinct from the general mentor ring.

components.name: Sage Mentor (Ring Orchestrator)
components.desc: General ring orchestrator: BEFORE (context enrichment, safety checks) > inner agent > AFTER (reasoning evaluation, window update). 14K+ LOC TypeScript across 20 modules. Integrated with website via 2 API routes. Delegates intimate data operations to Private Mentor boundary.
components.notes: Fully integrated with website. API routes connect Ring Wrapper to live mentor hubs. Serves real mentoring data.

components.name: 4-Stage Evaluation Sequence
components.desc: Prohairesis filter (logical: in my control?) > Kathekon (heuristic: appropriate?) > Passion diagnosis (causal: what false judgement?) > Unified virtue (reflective: whole character?). The master reasoning chain.
components.notes: Embedded in sage-reason-engine system prompts. Functions in every evaluation.

components.name: AI Safety Guardrails
components.desc: Safety checks: R1 (therapeutic), R2 (employment), R20 (distress detection). Logical rules + heuristic pattern matching.
components.notes: Functional guardrail logic connected to sage-guard and other tools.

components.name: Journal Interpretation (10 Layers)
components.desc: 19KB. Multi-layer interpretation pipeline spec. Cognitive profiling for mentorship.
components.notes: Spec exists (19KB doc). Code has 25 TODOs, layers 9-10 stub only. Correct status.

components.name: Journal Interpretation (10 Layers)
components.desc: Multi-layer cognitive profiling from external journals. 8+ analysis layers. Causal inference of belief patterns from written reflection.

components.name: Kathekon Assessment
components.desc: Stage 2: Appropriate action evaluation. Role-based duties, social obligations, situational propriety. Rule-of-thumb reasoning from oikeiosis.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Katorthoma Proximity Scale
components.desc: 5-level proximity: reflexive > habitual > deliberate > principled > sage-like. Qualitative, not numeric. The output language of all evaluations.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Oikeiosis Developmental Sequence
components.desc: Self > Household > Community > Cosmos. Expanding circles of concern. Analogical mapping from individual to universal. Governs all R0 decisions.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Passion Diagnosis
components.desc: Stage 3: Identifies the specific false judgement causing the passion. Diagnostic, not punitive (R6d). 4 root passions, 25 sub-species, 3 eupatheiai.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Prohairesis Filter
components.desc: Stage 1: Binary control check. Is this within the agent's sphere of choice? Logical deduction from dichotomy of control.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Prompt Injection Defence
components.desc: Content validation, injection signature detection. Deterministic pattern matching to protect reasoning integrity.
components.notes: Part of isolated Sage Mentor. Not integrated into website API layer.

components.name: Senecan Progress Tracking
components.desc: 3 grades of progress. 4 dimensions: passion reduction, judgement quality, disposition stability, oikeiosis extension. Reflective self-assessment over time.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.name: Unified Virtue Assessment
components.desc: Stage 4: Holistic character assessment. Unity of virtue thesis — virtues cannot be scored independently (R6b). Self-examining reflection on whole disposition.
components.notes: Verified in Stoic Brain v3 data. Confirmed.

components.desc: MCP tool registry endpoint for agent integration via Model Context Protocol.
components.notes: Functional endpoint. Serves MCP contracts.

components.desc: Reasoning receipt archive. Stores audit trail of all evaluations.

components.name: Mentor Profile Endpoint (GET/POST)
components.desc: GET returns encrypted MentorProfile from Supabase with text summary. POST seeds/updates profile with AES-256-GCM encryption. Falls back to static JSON if Supabase unavailable.
components.notes: Created 9 Apr 2026. Bridges journal extraction to baseline gap questions and weekly journal.

components.name: Mentor Baseline Response Processor
components.desc: Accepts practitioner's answers to gap detection questions. Reads profile from Supabase (encrypted), generates refinement notes via sage-reason. Returns confidence changes per dimension.
components.notes: Created 9 Apr 2026. Completes the gap-question feedback loop.

components.name: Server-Side Encryption Module
components.desc: AES-256-GCM encryption for profile data at rest in Supabase. Key from MENTOR_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var. Complements client-side encryption.ts.
components.notes: Created 9 Apr 2026. Used by mentor-profile-store for R17b compliance.

components.name: Encrypted Profile Storage (Supabase)
components.desc: CRUD for mentor_profiles table with encryption. Encrypts full MentorProfile JSON before write, decrypts on read. Stores non-sensitive metadata in queryable columns.
components.notes: Created 9 Apr 2026. Table created in Supabase with RLS. Profile seeded and tested.

components.name: Health Check Endpoint
components.desc: GET /api/health — system health check. Reports status of Supabase, Anthropic, Stripe, and mentor encryption subsystems. No auth required.
components.notes: Created 9 Apr 2026. Returns healthy/degraded based on critical subsystem availability.
